title: phaseolus vulgaris var. glaucoides
intro: Phaseolus vulgaris var. glaucoides, also known as blue bean or blue kidney bean, is a variety of the common bean plant (Phaseolus vulgaris). It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phaseolus vulgaris var. glaucoides include reducing blood sugar levels, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and crushing the beans, which can be used in teas, infusions, or as a supplement to support overall well-being.
